---
title: "Exploring the Frequency of _ACVR1_ mutations in DMG"
author: "Jo Lynne Rokita"
date: "2026-03-12"
output: html_document
---
# Load packages

```{r load_packages, echo = FALSE}
# load libraries
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(scales))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(readr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(forcats))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(maftools))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(janitor))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(writexl))
```

# Set directories; add function
```{r est base dir}
# establish base dir 
root_dir <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_dir(".git"))
data_dir <- file.path(root_dir, "data")

## add function
assign_age_group <- function(age_years) {
  case_when(
    is.na(age_years) ~ NA_character_,
    age_years < 12 ~ "<12",
    age_years >= 12 & age_years <= 18 ~ "12-18",
    age_years > 18 ~ ">18"
  )
}
```

# Read in histologies, clean data
```{r read histology, summarize}
hist <- read_tsv(file.path(data_dir, "histologies.tsv"))

remove_samples <- c("PT_8J4EYY40", # LGG, not DIPG
                    "PT_0MXPTTM3", # pnoc IDH, not DIPG
                    "PT_A0STSHYB", # mioncoseq grade II
                    "PT_BT43XECV" # mioncoseq questionable
                    )

dmg_samples <- hist %>%
  filter(
    !Kids_First_Participant_ID %in% remove_samples,
    cancer_group %in% c("Diffuse midline glioma", "Diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma") |
      pathology_diagnosis == "Brainstem glioma- Diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma"
  ) %>%
  filter(experimental_strategy %in% c("WGS", "WXS", "Targeted Panel"),
         !is.na(age_at_diagnosis_days))

dmg_patient_n <- dmg_samples %>%
  distinct(Kids_First_Participant_ID) %>%
  nrow()
```
# Read in mafs, remove intronic and silent variants
```{r read mafs}
maf_to <- read_tsv(file.path(data_dir, "snv-mutect2-tumor-only-plus-hotspots.maf.tsv.gz")) %>%
  filter(
    Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% dmg_samples$Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID,
    Hugo_Symbol == "ACVR1"
  ) %>%
  mutate(VAF = t_alt_count/(t_alt_count+t_ref_count)) %>%
  select(
    Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Hugo_Symbol, Variant_Classification,
    Chromosome, Start_Position, End_Position,
    Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2, Variant_Type,
    HGVSg, HGVSc, HGVSp, VAF, PolyPhen, SIFT, HotSpotAllele
  )

maf_tn <- read_tsv(file.path(data_dir, "snv-consensus-plus-hotspots.maf.tsv.gz")) %>%
  filter(
    Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% dmg_samples$Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID,
    Hugo_Symbol == "ACVR1"
  ) %>%
  mutate(VAF = t_alt_count/(t_alt_count+t_ref_count)) %>%
  select(
    Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Hugo_Symbol, Variant_Classification,
    Chromosome, Start_Position, End_Position,
    Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2, Variant_Type,
    HGVSg, HGVSc, HGVSp, VAF, PolyPhen, SIFT, HotSpotAllele
  )

maf_cat <- bind_rows(maf_to, maf_tn) %>%
  filter(!Variant_Classification %in% c("Silent", "Intron"))

# subset maf_cat for hotspots or predicted damaging variants
maf_hotspots <- maf_cat %>%
  filter(HotSpotAllele == 1 | grepl("deleterious", SIFT) | grepl("probably_damaging", PolyPhen))

```
# Join maf + clinical data
```{r add metadata}
hist_meta <- dmg_samples %>%
  select(
    Kids_First_Participant_ID,
    Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID,
    sample_id,
    age_at_event_days,
    tumor_descriptor,
    sub_cohort
  ) %>%
  distinct()

maf_clin <- maf_hotspots %>%
  rename(Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID = Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
  left_join(hist_meta, by = "Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID") %>%
  mutate(age_at_event_years = age_at_event_days/365.25) %>%
  filter(!is.na(HGVSp))

```

# Create patient tables
```{r patient tables}
maf_by_patient <- maf_clin %>%
  group_by(Kids_First_Participant_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    n_biospecimens = n_distinct(Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID),
    tumor_descriptors = paste(
      sort(unique(tumor_descriptor[!is.na(tumor_descriptor)])),
      collapse="; "
    ),
    variants = list(
      distinct(
        pick(
          Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID,
          tumor_descriptor,
          Variant_Classification,
          HGVSg,
          HGVSc,
          HGVSp,
          VAF,
          HotSpotAllele,
          PolyPhen, 
          SIFT, 
          age_at_event_years
        )
      )
    ),
    .groups="drop"
  )

maf_by_patient


```

# Summary of ACVR1 mutation frequency by tumor descriptor - one event per patient, prioritizing initial tumors
```{r summary by event}
# priority order for one descriptor per participant
descriptor_priority <- c(
  "Initial CNS Tumor",
  "Progressive",
  "Recurrence",
  "Progressive Disease Post-Mortem",
  "Deceased"
)

age_group_levels <- c("<12", "12-18", ">18")

# one tumor descriptor per participant
dmg_patient_one_descriptor <- dmg_samples %>%
  select(Kids_First_Participant_ID, tumor_descriptor, age_at_event_days) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(tumor_descriptor)) %>%
  mutate(
    tumor_descriptor = factor(tumor_descriptor, levels = descriptor_priority)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Kids_First_Participant_ID, tumor_descriptor, age_at_event_days) %>%
  group_by(Kids_First_Participant_ID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    age_years = age_at_event_days / 365.25,
    age_group = assign_age_group(age_years),
    age_group = factor(age_group, levels = c("<12", "12-18", ">18")),
    age_group = factor(age_group, levels = age_group_levels)
  )

acvr1_mut_patient_descriptor <- maf_clin %>%
  select(Kids_First_Participant_ID, tumor_descriptor) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(tumor_descriptor)) %>%
  mutate(
    tumor_descriptor = factor(tumor_descriptor, levels = descriptor_priority)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Kids_First_Participant_ID, tumor_descriptor) %>%
  group_by(Kids_First_Participant_ID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(ACVR1_mut = TRUE)

acvr1_age_summary_by_descriptor <- dmg_patient_one_descriptor %>%
  left_join(
    acvr1_mut_patient_descriptor,
    by = c("Kids_First_Participant_ID", "tumor_descriptor")
  ) %>%
  mutate(ACVR1_mut = coalesce(ACVR1_mut, FALSE)) %>%
  group_by(tumor_descriptor, age_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_acvr1_mut_pts = sum(ACVR1_mut),
    n_dmg_pts = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  complete(
    tumor_descriptor = factor(descriptor_priority, levels = descriptor_priority),
    age_group = factor(age_group_levels, levels = age_group_levels),
    fill = list(n_acvr1_mut_pts = 0, n_dmg_pts = 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    acvr1_mut_freq = if_else(n_dmg_pts > 0, n_acvr1_mut_pts / n_dmg_pts, NA_real_),
    summary = if_else(
      n_dmg_pts > 0,
      paste0(
        n_acvr1_mut_pts, "/", n_dmg_pts,
        " (", percent(acvr1_mut_freq, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
      ),
      "0/0"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(tumor_descriptor, age_group)

# manuscript-style wide table with age-group columns, Total row, and All column
acvr1_age_summary_table <- acvr1_age_summary_by_descriptor %>%
  select(tumor_descriptor, age_group, n_acvr1_mut_pts, n_dmg_pts) %>%
  bind_rows(
    # All column within each descriptor
    acvr1_age_summary_by_descriptor %>%
      group_by(tumor_descriptor) %>%
      summarise(
        age_group = "All",
        n_acvr1_mut_pts = sum(n_acvr1_mut_pts),
        n_dmg_pts = sum(n_dmg_pts),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    # Total row for each age group
    acvr1_age_summary_by_descriptor %>%
      group_by(age_group) %>%
      summarise(
        tumor_descriptor = "Total",
        n_acvr1_mut_pts = sum(n_acvr1_mut_pts),
        n_dmg_pts = sum(n_dmg_pts),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    # Grand total
    acvr1_age_summary_by_descriptor %>%
      summarise(
        tumor_descriptor = "Total",
        age_group = "All",
        n_acvr1_mut_pts = sum(n_acvr1_mut_pts),
        n_dmg_pts = sum(n_dmg_pts)
      )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    tumor_descriptor = factor(
      tumor_descriptor,
      levels = c(descriptor_priority, "Total")
    ),
    age_group = factor(
      age_group,
      levels = c(age_group_levels, "All")
    ),
    acvr1_mut_freq = if_else(n_dmg_pts > 0, n_acvr1_mut_pts / n_dmg_pts, NA_real_),
  summary = paste0(
    n_acvr1_mut_pts, "/", n_dmg_pts,
    " (", percent(acvr1_mut_freq, accuracy = 0.1), ")"
  )) %>%
  arrange(tumor_descriptor, age_group) %>%
  select(tumor_descriptor, age_group, summary) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = age_group,
    values_from = summary
  )

# summary table for ACVR1 mutations by age 
datatable(
  acvr1_age_summary_table,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "none",
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 25,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel")
  )
)

write_xlsx(
  acvr1_age_summary_table,
  file.path(root_dir, "dmg_pts_acvr1_freq.xlsx"))
```

# export table with all patients and variant info
```{r export table}
acvr1_mutation_table <- maf_clin %>%
  filter(!is.na(tumor_descriptor)) %>%
  distinct(
    Kids_First_Participant_ID,
    Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID,
    sample_id,
    tumor_descriptor,
    sub_cohort,
    age_at_event_days,
    Variant_Classification,
    HGVSg,
    HGVSc,
    HGVSp,
    HotSpotAllele,
    PolyPhen,
    SIFT,
    VAF
  ) %>%
  full_join(dmg_samples %>% 
             select(Kids_First_Participant_ID, Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID, sample_id, tumor_descriptor,
                                 sub_cohort, age_at_event_days)) %>%
  mutate(
    age_years = age_at_event_days / 365.25,
    age_group = assign_age_group(age_years),
    age_group = factor(age_group, levels = c("<12", "12-18", ">18")),
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    tumor_descriptor = fct_relevel(
      tumor_descriptor,
      "Initial CNS Tumor",
      "Progressive",
      "Recurrence",
      "Progressive Disease Post-Mortem",
      "Deceased"
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    Kids_First_Participant_ID,
    tumor_descriptor
  )

# full dataset
datatable(
  acvr1_mutation_table,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 25,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    buttons = c("copy", "csv", "excel")
  )
)

write_xlsx(
  acvr1_mutation_table,
  file.path(root_dir, "dmg_pts_acvr1_status.xlsx")
)

acvr1_mutation_table %>%
  select(Kids_First_Participant_ID) %>%
  unique() %>%
  nrow()

```

# Session info

```{r session info}
sessionInfo()
```
